ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(CCR_Type__c ,'Customer Returns / Refunds'), OR( ISBLANK( Opportunity__c ), Booking__r.Opportunity__r.Id <> Opportunity__r.Id, Booking__r.RecordType.Name <> 'Booking', Account_Name__c <> Booking__r.Account_Name__c, Impacts_Commission__c <> TRUE ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: 1)Opportunity and it's related Original Booking are required 2)AccountName should be equal to Account on Booking 3)Impacts Commisions should be checked for CCR type "Customer Returns / Refunds"
